center.name: 羅伯特·斯文豪
center.summary: 羅伯特·斯文豪是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括纯色啄花鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species was described and given its binomial name by Robert Swinhoe in 1870. It is found in the central Himalayas, through western Indonesia to Taiwan

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species was described and given its binomial name by Robert Swinhoe in 1870. It is found in the central Himalayas, through western Indonesia to Taiwan
